MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-04-286593 Estate of Joyce Benton.

Appearances: Gregory Martin for and with Alvin Benton.

The Court stated that the Estate was not in a position for final distribution, that a number of Attorneys were entitled to share in the extraordinary and statutory fees, that fees would be ascertained at the time of final distribution and that Mr. Martin's fee petition and the petition for final distribution would have to coincide.
